one_line: Kingmaker-general of Vijayanagara who led its armies at the Battle of Talikota, 1565 CE.

appearance.age_look: Late 50s to early 60s, tall and broad-shouldered, with a seasoned warrior’s build that is still imposing despite age.
appearance.face: Oval face with strong cheekbones, medium-brown South Indian complexion, neatly trimmed grey-black moustache and short beard, a sharp, slightly aquiline nose, faint forehead lines, and intense, focused eyes; default expression calm, commanding, and slightly stern.
appearance.hair: Wavy, shoulder-length hair streaked grey and black, tied low at the nape; on top he wears a dark maroon cloth turban in classic Vijayanagara style, layered and slightly conical, with a subtle gold border and a single central ruby-like gem at the front.
appearance.costume: He wears a long-sleeved, knee-length angarakha-style coat of rich deep-red silk, wrapping left over right and tied with inner ties, the coat edged with a narrow gold border and tiny floral motifs; beneath it are cream-coloured, slightly loose cotton trousers gathered at the ankles; over the coat he has a dark-green silk patka-style waist sash wrapped twice around and knotted on his left side, the hanging ends embroidered with gold thread; draped over his left shoulder and around his torso is a heavy off-white silk anga-vastram with a broad gold zari border, flowing back like a short, dignified cape; he wears polished brown leather boots reaching just above the ankles, and simple but regal jewellery: a short, thick gold necklace with a single central pendant, two gold armlets on his upper arms engraved with floral designs, a pair of small gold hoop earrings, and several gold rings on his right hand; on the battlefield version, a fitted steel breastplate shaped to the torso is worn over the angarakha, plain but edged with a narrow brass rim, and a steel bracer on his left forearm for parrying.
appearance.signature: A single-handed South Indian steel sword with a slightly curved broad blade, a distinctive Indo-Islamic basket hilt and disc pommel, and a dark-red leather scabbard with brass fittings hanging from his left hip on a dark-brown leather belt beneath his green waist sash.

ref_desc: Aliya Rama Raya is a tall, broad-shouldered, late-middle-aged South Indian man with a medium-brown complexion, grey-streaked shoulder-length hair tied back, maroon turban, deep-red angarakha, cream trousers, green waist sash, off-white gold-bordered anga-vastram, simple regal jewellery, steel breastplate, and a curved steel sword with red scabbard at his left hip.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Aliya Rama Raya: a tall, broad-shouldered, late-middle-aged South Indian man with medium-brown skin, an oval face, strong cheekbones, neat grey-black moustache and short beard, and calm but commanding eyes. His wavy, shoulder-length hair streaked grey and black is tied low at the nape, and he wears a layered, slightly conical maroon cloth turban with a thin gold border and a single small ruby-like gem at the front. He is dressed in a long-sleeved, knee-length deep-red silk angarakha-style coat that wraps left over right, edged with a narrow gold border and tiny floral motifs, over cream-coloured, slightly loose cotton trousers gathered at the ankles. Around his waist is a dark-green silk patka-style sash wrapped twice and knotted on his left side, its hanging ends embroidered with gold thread, and over his left shoulder and across his torso is draped a heavy off-white silk anga-vastram with a broad gold zari border, flowing back like a short cape. On the martial version of the design he wears a plain, fitted steel breastplate with a narrow brass rim over the angarakha and a steel bracer on his left forearm, along with polished brown leather boots that reach just above the ankles. He has dignified jewellery: a short thick gold necklace with a central pendant, gold armlets on both upper arms, small gold hoop earrings, and several gold rings on his right hand. At his left hip, hanging from a dark-brown leather belt beneath the green sash, is his signature weapon: a single-handed South Indian steel sword with a slightly curved broad blade, an ornate basket hilt with disc pommel, and a dark-red leather scabbard with brass fittings. Show him from front, side, and back, keeping the deep red, dark green, cream, gold, and brown leather palette consistent across hair, garments, armour, and sword details.
